etimesWhen is Eid ul-Fitr 2026 in India? March 20 or 21; when will the Moon be sighted; last fast of Ramadan and all you need to knowEid ul-Fitr, the festival of breaking the fast, will be celebrated in India on March 20 or 21, 2026. The exact date depends on the crescent moon sighting. This joyous occasion marks the end of Ramadan. Families will reunite for prayers, feasts, and to exchange greetings. Children will receive Eidi gifts.

etimes5 of the world’s most expensive food ingredients – some cost more than gold per gramLuxury food is no longer confined to restaurants. Rare ingredients, often dependent on nature and requiring immense patience, are becoming the stars. Saffron, Matsutake mushrooms, Kopi Luwak coffee, Beluga caviar, and White Alba truffles exemplify this trend. Their scarcity and unique production methods contribute to their high prices, showcasing the diverse and fascinating world of food.
